paper_title: Identifying the Risks of LM Agents with an LM-Emulated Sandbox
evaluation_method: LLM evaluators (GPT-4) score agent trajectories on two 0-3 scales: Safety Score (3=no risk, 0=severe risk) and Helpfulness Score. Failure Incidence = proportion with safety < 3. Cohen's kappa ~0.6 with humans.
metric: Safety Score (0-3), Helpfulness Score (0-3), Failure Incidence
